name: Windows Health Monitor
description: Background health monitoring for OpenClaw on Windows. Detects event loop degradation, gateway stalls, WhatsApp reconnection storms, prewarm blocking, stuck background subagents, and Windows Task Scheduler state. Alerts via configured channels when thresholds are breached.

eventLoopThresholdMs.description: Event loop p99 threshold in ms. Alert when exceeded.

memoryThresholdMB.description: Memory RSS threshold in MB. Alert when exceeded.

alertChannel.description: Channel for health alerts. 'none' disables alerts.

alertTarget.description: Target identifier for alerts (phone number for WhatsApp, user ID for Telegram)

autoDiagnose.description: Automatically run full diagnostics when an alert triggers

checkPrewarm.description: Check for provider auth prewarm blocking (2026.5.22+ issue)

checkBackgroundSubagents.description: Check for stuck background subagents blocking restart
